title: End-to-End (E2E) Testing Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on E2E software testing.

questions.question: Regarding the testing of web applications, what is the primary role of 'End-to-End (E2E) Testing'?
options: To collect and analyze data from the database
To verify that an application's entire workflow functions correctly from start to finish
